text: {\pos(655,410)}Translation\NYibis
{\pos(655,500)}Soundtracking\NHalee
{\pos(1050,142)}Editing\NSewil
{\pos(1050,253)}Infoboxes\NSewil
{\pos(1050,383)}Timing\NDatenshi
{\pos(1050,493)}Edit-checking\NGalaxy 9000
Until I can reach the sky,
I believe, until the next tomorrow, hey
Chasing and being chased on top of Mobius' ring.
Getting closer and facing forward, hey I want to share your style.
It begins, it expands, this flavor that exceeds imagination
I feel so good throughout my body, I will become free, oh yeah
Share the music, even if it's far.
Share the one dream, by telling each other.
Share the good times and laugh.
I'll keep going until I can reach the sky.
Let's overcome it now, I believe in the next tomorrow yeah yeah...
You were waiting there on the other side of the invisible wall.
I'll be there soon, I believe in one world yeah yeah...
{\fad(650,1000)}Flying Fish Riders

name: Luffy
text: See you guys later!

name: Pirate 1
text: We'll never forget what you did for us, Straw Hat!

name: Pirate 2
text: The sun...! Thanks for giving us the sun back!

name: Brook
text: Everyone! Be careful to not get yourselves wiped out!

name: Usopp
text: Don't say crazy stuff like that!

name: Nami
text: Lola! Thanks for the Vivrecard! Stay well!

name: Lola
text: If you meet Mama, give her my regards!

name: Lola
text: Let's meet again someday, Namizou!

name: Luffy
text: Set sail!

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}No one truly knows what happens in this mysterious sea, the Florian Triangle...{\i0}

name: Lola
text: They're gone...

name: Pirate 1
text: Seems like it.

name: Lola
text: Now that that's over, let's set sail tomorrow!

name: Pirates
text: Yeah!

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}Every year, over 100 ships vanish in the mist.{\i0}

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}This started long before the enormous pirate ship, Thriller Bark, started hiding in the mist ten years ago.{\i0}

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}It is a deep, ancient mystery...{\i0}

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}It is lucky that the mist is as thick as ever this day...{\i0}

name: Narrator
text: {\i1}For that strange face in the sea is concealed by its thick white veil...{\i0}

name: Nami
text: Luffy...

name: Nami
text: Is this really okay with you?

name: Luffy
text: Huh?

name: Luffy
text: Ah, about Ace's paper, huh?

name: Luffy
text: It's fine. Don't worry about it.

name: Brook
text: Luffy-san, I would have no objections if you wished to take a detour!

name: Brook
text: Time is of no great importance to Laboon and myself!

name: Brook
text: To "live" and "meet once more"... That is all that matters!

name: Usopp
text: Luffy, we're all totally fine if you want to take a detour!

name: Chopper
text: It's fine, it's fine!

name: Franky
text: Yeah! Let's go see your whale of a brother!

name: Luffy
text: No, it's fine, really!

name: Luffy
text: Even if he was in some kind of trouble, he wouldn't want me to worry...

name: Luffy
text: Ace hates being made to look weak!

name: Luffy
text: If we went to help him, he'd just get pissed off.

name: Luffy
text: If we do meet up, it'll be as enemy pirates!

name: Luffy
text: Ace has his own adventure.

name: Sanji
text: That "Vivre Card" apparently doesn't just shrink when the owner's in bad condition...

name: Sanji
text: It goes back to how it was once they recover.

name: Luffy
text: Yeah! If we meet, it'll be at that time.

name: Luffy
text: That's why Ace gave me this paper, right?

name: Luffy
text: Oh, and Zoro!

name: Luffy
text: You were asleep all along, so we haven't done this yet!

name: Usopp
text: Well, let's do it properly then!

name: Usopp
text: To celebrate the recruitment of our new companion, the musician Brook...

name: Strawhats
text: Cheers!

name: Brook
text: Most obliged!

name: Luffy
text: Alright! Pull in the sails! We'll launch our way out of here with the Coup de Burst!

name: Franky
text: {\fad(150,150)}Coup de Burst!

name: Brook
text: What is this?!

name: Caption
text: {\fad(2000,0)}Holy Land, Mariejoa

name: Sengoku
text: Don't be ridiculous!

name: Sengoku
text: Bartholomew Kuma, are you telling me that they managed to escape from your powers?!

name: Sengoku
text: I want a better explanation than that! I'm the one who has to report this to the higher-ups!

name: Garp
text: Just what I expected from my grandson!

name: Sengoku
text: Garp, be quiet!

name: Sengoku
text: You were given a special Government order to eliminate the whole crew,

name: Sengoku
text: yet you couldn't even bring back Straw Hat Luffy's head? This is a disgrace!

name: Garp
text: Don't worry about that, Sengoku!

name: Garp
text: Luffy isn't the kind of guy who would go around bragging about defeating Moriah anyway!

name: Sengoku
text: Hmph!

name: Sengoku
text: Kuma, I hope you didn't take pity on those pirates just because they were injured.

name: Sengoku
text: Because you've failed to take this seriously, this game of cat-and-mouse will have no end.

name: Sengoku
text: If they continue blindly following the Log, as they are now, they will draw ever closer to the Navy HQ.

name: Garp
text: Oh, yeah, by the way... I brought the new tea!

name: Garp
text: Get out the crackers!

name: Sengoku
text: Garp, will you be quiet?!
A few days later
{\fad(400,0)}Grand Line
{\fad(500,0)}Thousand Sunny

name: Nami
text: Serpent currents!

name: Chopper
text: Serpent... currents?

name: Nami
text: Everyone, be careful!

name: Luffy
text: Let's go, everyone!
That's...

name: Franky
text: {\fad(150,150)}Coup de Burst!

name: Luffy
text: We're here...

name: Luffy
text: We've finally made it this far!

name: Nami
text: It feels kind of nostalgic...

name: Chopper
text: I can't see the top! It's huge!

name: Chopper
text: So this is the Red Line?

name: Zoro
text: I wonder if we've matured since then?

name: Usopp
text: I kinda feel like crying!

name: Usopp
text: A lot of stuff has happened, huh?

name: Luffy
text: Anyways, now we're halfway there!

name: Luffy
text: The Twin Capes on the other side of the world, where we met Laboon, is connected to this spot!

name: Caption
text: {\fad(250,0)}Current location

name: Luffy
text: It's great that we've all made it this far, huh?

name: Franky
text: I was told I came over Reverse Mountain from South Blue when I was just a kid...

name: Franky
text: But I guess that's a 30 year old tale.

name: Robin
text: I came to this sea from West Blue, five years ago.

name: Luffy
text: When we've crossed the other half of the world, and see this wall again...

name: Luffy
text: At that time...

name: Luffy
text: I'll be the Pirate King! {Starts Late}

name: Nami
text: But we've got to be careful now.

name: Nami
text: This place is close to the "Holy Land" of the World Government and the Navy HQ, Mariejoa.

name: Chopper
text: This "surprise-pool" is the best!

name: Zoro
text: I'm too weak.

name: Zoro
text: I have to become stronger!

name: Zoro
text: I'm still far too weak!

name: Zoro
text: I'm still...!

name: Nami
text: How is it, Robin, Brook, Luffy?

name: Robin
text: No use. It's completely black.

name: Luffy
text: It's totally black out there!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, I think I saw something there!

name: Brook
text: Was that the eyeball of a monster?

name: Chopper
text: A-a monster?

name: Brook
text: W-We are going to die!

name: Brook
text: Although I am already dead!

name: Brook
text: Oh, by the way, Nami-san? I have a question...

name: Brook
text: What panties are you wearing today?

name: Nami
text: Shut up! Take this seriously!

name: Chopper
text: Scary...!

name: Usopp
text: He's a plucky guy, huh?

name: Franky
text: Hey, you guys! The Shark Submerge can't go any deeper than 5,000 metres, so be careful!

name: Brook
text: Hmm? The hull seems to be creaking.

name: Robin
text: Yes, it's because...

name: Robin
text: we're deeper than 5,000 metres right now.

name: Brook
text: Ah, that means...

name: Brook
text: But that is terrible! We are going to be crushed by the water-pressure!

name: Luffy
text: Oh! The monster from earlier! It's still here!

name: Robin
text: What a big mouth it has.

name: Luffy
text: Watch out!

name: Luffy
text: It's gonna eat us!

name: Brook
text: Here it comes again!

name: Franky
text: This sounds pretty bad...

name: Chopper
text: I don't want to ride the Shark Submerge...

name: Usopp
text: Me neither.

name: Sanji
text: Nami-swan!

name: Sanji
text: The "Horror-Nashi Tarte" from Thriller Bark is done!

name: Nami
text: Oh, it looks good!

name: Nami
text: But this is a problem...

name: Nami
text: It tastes great!

name: Franky; Usopp and Chopper
text: It's good!

name: Sanji
text: It's the same problem we had with Sky Island.

name: Nami
text: That's right...

name: Nami
text: We know the direction we have to take,

name: Nami
text: but we have no idea how we're gonna get there.

name: Nami
text: How are we gonna reach Fishman Island?

name: Luffy
text: We're back!

name: Brook
text: That was fun!

name: Nami
text: Welcome back! Good work!

name: Luffy
text: It's no use!

name: Luffy
text: We can't see anything on the bottom of the sea at all. Is Fishman Island really there?

name: Brook
text: That was my first time riding a submarine.

name: Robin
text: If we'd have gone further down, the pressure would have killed us.

name: Nami
text: The Log Pose is certainly pointing straight down, but...

name: Nami
text: This is no good... I should have gotten some more info from Lola and the others.

name: Luffy
text: It's that thing from earlier!

name: Brook
text: It followed us!

name: Luffy
text: Don't think you can beat me when we're above the water!

name: Usopp
text: Somehow, he didn't seem all that huge.

name: Chopper
text: Because we dealt with Oars! Seems like we're fine.

name: Sanji
text: Something came out.

name: Luffy
text: A fish?

name: Usopp
text: A person?!

name: Brook
text: No, that is wrong...

name: Robin
text: That's a...

name: Sanji
text: C-Could it be?!

name: Camie
text: Ah! I crushed a human!

name: Camie
text: I'm so sorry! Are you OK?

name: Sanji
text: Oh, don't worry about it~!

name: Sanji
text: Anyway, who are...

name: Camie
text: {\an8}Please pull yourself together! Are you OK?

name: Nami
text: That's...

name: Camie
text: {\an8}I can't believe I did something like that! Please pull yourself together!

name: Usopp
text: A fin...

name: Nami
text: Could it really be...?

name: Strawhats
text: A mermaid?!

name: Camie
text: What a shock! There are so many humans here!

name: Luffy
text: W-What?

name: Chopper
text: W-We're surprised too!
{\fad(800,0)\fs55}Camie
{\fad(800,0)\fs32}Kissing Gourami\NMermaid
{\fad(800,0)\fs32}(Designer Apprentice,
{\fad(800,0)\fs32}Takoyaki Shop Employee)

name: Camie
text: {\an8}I thought I was going to be digested. Thank you for saving me.

name: Camie
text: {\an8}I keep getting swallowed by monsters.

name: Camie
text: This was probably the 20th time.

name: Usopp
text: You get eaten too much!

name: Camie
text: I have to repay you somehow.

name: Camie
text: Oh, I know! Would you like some takoyaki?

name: Luffy
text: Takoyaki?! That's my favorite food!

name: Camie
text: Really?! Then that'll be 500 belly per person!

name: Pappag
text: Hey, you're selling them?!

name: Camie
text: I screwed up!

name: Sanji
text: Mermaid~! Mermaid~!

name: Sanji
text: Mermaids, the dream of all mankind! Mermaids, the jewels of the ocean!

name: Sanji
text: Yes, I've finally gotten to meet one of them!

name: Sanji
text: She's so cute~!

name: Sanji
text: This is the first time I've ever met one!

name: Sanji
text: Camie, was it?

name: Usopp
text: It's not the first time.

name: Usopp
text: You met old lady Kokoro, didn't you?

name: Sanji
text: Thriller Bark? No, that wasn't scary. Not scary at all.

name: Sanji
text: The scariest thing we've encountered so far was...

name: Usopp
text: Uh, that's right, Sanji! Let's just pretend that never happened!

name: Usopp
text: This is the first mermaid we've ever met!

name: Nami
text: You guys are so rude!

name: Luffy
text: Huh? Old lady Kokoro was a mermaid?

name: Luffy
text: But she could walk, couldn't she?

name: Franky
text: I see... You didn't know, huh?

name: Franky
text: Well, it happened while you were fighting that Lucci fellow after all.

name: Luffy
text: Imagining old lady Kokoro as a mermaid is really gross for some reason.

name: Nami
text: You are too freaking blunt!

name: Nami
text: Geez, when it comes to this guy's expectations of mermaids...

name: Robin
text: But she seems like a cute mermaid, doesn't she?

name: Brook
text: This is my first encounter with a mermaid too.

name: Brook
text: Excuse me, would you please lend me some money?

name: Sanji
text: Why would she?!

name: Camie
text: A skeleton!

name: Sanji
text: See?! How are you gonna make it up if you scare her?! Get lost!

name: Brook
text: I can open my head as well. Isn't that funny?

name: Sanji
text: Why you...!

name: Camie
text: That's so funny!

name: Usopp
text: She sure got over that quickly.

name: Luffy
text: By the way, can you poop?

name: Sanji
text: What are you trying to ask, damn you?!

name: Camie
text: Ah, well, I...

name: Sanji
text: Don't answer!

name: Sanji
text: {\an8}She does not poop!

name: Pappag
text: Camie? Camie? This is just weird...

name: Pappag
text: Aren't you missing someone?

name: Pappag
text: Who's the one left out of this fun group?

name: Pappag
text: Answer: Me.

name: Luffy
text: That's right. I was wondering about this...

name: Luffy
text: Hey, Camie, what's this?\NThis talking glove-thingy...

name: Camie
text: Oh, sorry. I completely forgot.\NHe's my pet, Pappag.

name: Camie
text: He's a starfish, and he's my master.

name: Pappag
text: Nice to meet you!

name: Nami
text: Can starfish talk?

name: Usopp
text: Isn't it strange for her pet to be her master?

name: Pappag
text: Well, I was taken in, and with reason.

name: Pappag
text: Camie always feeds me clams

name: Nami
text: So she feeds you?

name: Pappag
text: Am I a person? I'm a starfish, yet I'm not a human.

name: Pappag
text: Am I not a person? I'm not a person, but I am a starfish.

name: Pappag
text: Are you busy? No, it's fine.

name: Pappag
text: We've got enough hands around here.

name: Pappag
text: Yay, thank you!

name: Pappag
text: This is where you're supposed to laugh!

name: Camie
text: So, this T-shirt is of the "Criminal" brand, and it's really popular on Fishman Island these days.

name: Usopp
text: Oh?

name: Chopper
text: That's pretty cool.

name: Camie
text: Pappug designed it!

name: Camie
text: I want to become a designer one day too!

name: Sanji
text: You will! You'll definitely make it, Camie!

name: Camie
text: Thank you, Sanji!

name: Pappag
text: Nobody listens to me...

name: Luffy
text: Oh yeah, you. How can you talk?

name: Pappag
text: I'm glad you asked!

name: Pappag
text: Back when I was a kid, I always thought I was a human.

name: Pappag
text: By the time I found out that I was actually a starfish, I was already speaking the human language!

name: Luffy
text: Does it really work like that?

name: Pappag
text: Ah, the world works in strange and frightening ways. That's just how the world is!

name: Pappag
text: Anyway, I'm Pappag the starfish!
{\fad(1000,1200)\fs27}The starfish
{\fad(1000,1200)\fs27}(Criminal brand\Ndesigner)

name: Pappag
text: Up-and-coming designer.

name: Pappag
text: Thanks for saving me!

name: Nami
text: What a relief! We were having trouble figuring out what to do. I want to ask you something...

name: Luffy
text: Hey, Nami! The takoyaki comes first!

name: Camie
text: Ah, that's right! The takoyaki to show my gratitude!

name: Camie
text: Well, I've got to meet up with Hacchin somewhere.

name: Luffy
text: Hacchin?

name: Camie
text: Hello, Hacchin? This is Camie!

name: Camie
text: Sorry I got kinda lost. Where are you right now?

name: Macro
text: Oh, that voice must be Camie, right?

name: Camie
text: Hacchin?

name: Macro
text: Do you know who you're talking to?\NThis ain't Hacchin, y'know!

name: Camie
text: You're not Hacchin?!

name: Macro
text: This is Macro! From the simple-minded Macro Crew! Wait, I shouldn't say that myself...

name: Robin
text: Seems like trouble.

name: Camie
text: Why do you have Hacchin's Transponder Snail?

name: Macro
text: 'Cause we beat up Hachi! Isn't it obvious?!

name: Camie
text: Liar! There is no way Hacchin would lose to you guys!

name: Macro
text: Yeah, you have a point. Usually, we'd be no match for him,

name: Macro
text: but this time, we had the Flying Fish Riders on our side!

name: Pappag
text: The Flying Fish Riders?!

name: Hachi
text: Camie, are you still alright? Thank goodness.

name: Camie
text: Hacchin! Did they really beat you?

name: Hachi
text: I let my guard down.

name: Hachi
text: Don't come here! I'll take out these guys and come straight back! It'll be fine!

name: Macro
text: Y'know, Camie, we're just about to sell this guy.

name: Macro
text: Octopus Fishmen are pretty rare, so he should fetch us quite the price.

name: Macro
text: Feel free to come and save him!

name: Macro
text: We're at the Sabaody Archipelago, in the waters five kilometres east of grove 44.

name: Macro
text: This is where the Flying Fish Riders' base is!

name: Hachi
text: No! Camie, don't come here!

name: Macro
text: Shut up, you damn octopus!

name: Macro
text: See ya!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin...

name: Luffy
text: So what about the takoyaki?

name: Franky and Sanji
text: This isn't the time for that!

name: Nami
text: Wait... The voice of that Hacchin guy we just heard on the Transponder-Snail. It seemed kinda familiar...

name: Nami
text: It's just my imagination, right? There's no way...

name: Camie
text: Sorry, Luffy-chin. Can we do takoyaki later?

name: Camie
text: I've got to go save my friend!

name: Luffy
text: Huh?

name: Franky and Sanji
text: Hey!

name: Nami
text: Wait, Camie.

name: Nami
text: I shouldn't be meddling here, but if you want to save your friend, then we'll help you!

name: Nami
text: No, that's wrong. I mean, they'll help you!

name: Franky & Usopp
text: Why, you...!

name: Nami
text: And in exchange, how about you help us get to Fishman Island?

name: Camie
text: Really, Nami-chin?

name: Camie
text: You're gonna help me save Hacchin, Luffy-chin?

name: Luffy
text: Well, I'm fine with it. But who is this Hacchin anyway?

name: Camie
text: He runs the Takoyaki store I work at.

name: Camie
text: Our takoyaki is the best in the world!

name: Luffy
text: That's important!

name: Luffy
text: Men! Even if it costs you your lives, we're gonna save the takoyaki!

name: Strawhats
text: Yeah!

name: Nami
text: They say it's okay. So, do you know where they are?

name: Camie
text: Yeah, let's see...

name: Pappag
text: Grove 44 is an island at the very eastern edge of the archipelago.

name: Pappag
text: 5 kilometres west from there. I guess the Flying Fish Riders' base would be about here.

name: Pappag
text: Seeing how we're about here right now...

name: Pappag
text: If we head straight for the Sabaody Archipelago from here, we should pass it on the way.

name: Pappag
text: So, let's head west!

name: Pappag
text: Afterwards we can ask the fish, and figure it out.

name: Camie
text: Yeah, that's right. Let's hurry and go!

name: Camie
text: Hey!

name: Luffy
text: Wow! The fish are sticking their heads out!

name: Camie
text: We want you to lead the way!

name: Camie
text: They say they're afraid of the Flying Fish and won't take us all the way, but will show us the direction.

name: Nami
text: Incredible! You can talk to fish?

name: Nami
text: I had no idea mermaids could do that!

name: Luffy
text: Camie, if you were around, we could eat as much fish as we wanted!

name: Sanji
text: Watch your mouth. I'll beat you senseless.

name: Nami
text: But how do we follow the fish in the sea anyway?

name: Pappag
text: Well, just take a look!

name: Luffy
text: Awesome!

name: Usopp
text: They can do this? I don't believe it!

name: Usopp
text: The fish are drawing an arrow on the sea!

name: Nami
text: Fantastic! We just have to follow this, right?

name: Luffy
text: You're awesome, Camie!

name: Camie
text: No, I have a long way to go.

name: Luffy
text: No, this is really impressive!

name: Usopp
text: Alright! Then, I'll take the helm!

name: Robin
text: Turn it around to 4 o'clock.

name: Usopp
text: Right!

name: Luffy
text: Zoro!

name: Zoro
text: Are we already setting off? Does it look like we can make it to Fishman Island?

name: Luffy
text: Forget that, and look here. It's Camie the mermaid! She's real! Awesome, right?

name: Camie
text: Hello!

name: Zoro
text: A mermaid?

name: Zoro
text: First time I've seen one.

name: Chopper
text: He erased it! He just... erased his memory!

name: Camie
text: But I'm worried.

name: Camie
text: Hacchin sounded like he had trouble talking. I'm sure they've done something awful to him.

name: Pappag
text: Well, he's tough, so it should be alright.

name: Pappag
text: Anyway, you guys were pretty quick to offer your help, but are you sure you can handle this?

name: Luffy
text: Yeah! We're strong.

name: Pappag
text: I should warn you, there's not just one gang of kidnappers around here.

name: Pappag
text: Human trading is big business on Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Sanji
text: Selling human lives? That's horrible!

name: Pappag
text: And seeing how mermaids are particularly valuable,

name: Pappag
text: the Macro crew, a gang of three fishmen, have been after Camie for a while now.

name: Pappag
text: Hachi from the Takoyaki shop probably thought we were kidnapped by the Macro Crew

name: Pappag
text: and went after them, since we'd been missing for a while after we were eaten by that monster.

name: Camie
text: That's probably it.

name: Camie
text: Hacchin is a kind, straight-forward person after all.

name: Camie
text: It's my fault.

name: Zoro
text: Hearing about this octopus named Hachi,\NI can't help but think of that stupid fishman.

name: Sanji
text: If it's really him, then we're not gonna help.

name: Sanji
text: Well, there's no way...

name: Pappag
text: Usually, Hachi could beat those guys easily...

name: Pappag
text: But who'd have thought the Flying Fish Riders would help them?

name: Franky
text: Who're they?

name: Pappag
text: Another kidnapping gang who started causing a lot of trouble around these parts recently.

name: Pappag
text: They say that if they target you, you're doomed.

name: Pappag
text: Their boss, Duval, is a guy with an iron mask.

name: Pappag
text: Nobody knows what he really looks like.

name: Pappag
text: It seems like they're looking for someone.

name: Pappag
text: They check every single ship that passes this area.

name: Luffy
text: Well, anyway, there's no need for you to worry, Camie. We'll definitely save the takoyaki!

name: Pappag
text: It's the takoyaki seller!

name: Camie
text: Thank you, Luffy-chin!

name: Luffy
text: Well then, Brook! Play a song to get us in the mood!

name: Brook
text: With pleasure!

name: Usopp
text: Huh? Is that...?

name: Usopp
text: Hey! We're in trouble!

name: Nami
text: What's wrong, Camie?

name: Camie
text: The fish said, "We're sorry, but we can't take you any further."

name: Pappag
text: They're here! The Flying Fish Riders!

name: Luffy
text: Where? I can't see anything!

name: Camie
text: Wrong! They're not in the sea, but in the air!

name: Usopp
text: The fish are flying!

name: Luffy
text: So cool!

name: Zoro
text: Is this the time to be impressed?!

name: Franky
text: Damn, they're gonna attack us!

name: Chopper
text: So the "Flying Fish" really can fly?!

name: Raider 1
text: Hey, did you see that?!

name: Raider 2
text: I saw it! No doubt, that's the Straw Hat Pirates!

name: Raider 1
text: Contact him right now!

name: Raider 2
text: Understood.

name: Raider 1
text: We only came here to find a single mermaid, but this must be our lucky day!

name: Raider 2
text: Master Duval is gonna be overjoyed!

name: Sanji
text: Here they come again!

name: Usopp
text: Don't come any closer!

name: Zoro
text: Bombs, huh?

name: Luffy
text: Damn those guys!

name: Zoro
text: {\fad(150,150)}72 Pound Canon!

name: Luffy
text: {\fad(150,150)}Pistol!

name: Usopp
text: That was close.

name: Camie
text: Be careful! Once the flying fish jump out of the water, they can stay in the air for five minutes!
{\fad(150,1800)}Flying Fish Riders'\NHideout
Hey, Macro.
Yes, Duval, my lord.
It seems that the mermaid you were luring to the base is on a pirate ship right now.
Huh? Camie is on a pirate ship?!
I'm sick of waiting... I really was sick of waiting!
That pirate ship is the one I've been waiting for!
I'll kill him!
That man who screwed up my life!
